Switch.Markov: Aderiol Adeth Adiol Aerand Aerannol Aerathiand Aeriol Aeron Aerond Ailill Amaethon Aneirin Aodh Aonghus Arawn Arthfael Bedivere Belanor Belenos Brandior Brochfael Cadfael Cael Carrinnor Cernunnos Connla Conor Coriand Cynwrig Dagda Deimne Deinniol Dewydd Diarmaid Dylan Eannin Earand Earin Earond Eilieth Eiliol Einion Einiond Eirdor Ellarond Ellethiand Ellonviol Elluthiol Elluvior Eoghan Eonthiol Eremon Evand Evandiol Faedior Faennin Faeonel Fearghas Fionn Gareth Glenndower Gofannon Goronwy Gwenddoleu Gwydion Halamar Heilyn Herule Heruli Ianiol Ianor Iorwerth Iriol Iruthiond Iuand Iuthol Ivaran Jannalor Lamruil Llew Llyr Luthais Luthior Luvieth Lythinn Maelgwn Manawydan Mealcun Merfyn Mermin Morcant Myarand Myaron Myrddin Naoise Neirin Nuada Nunviond Nuvian Nynniaw Oissine Parthalan Peredur Pwyll Rheviand Rhiviond Rhondor Rhosior Segdae Seisyll Sharian Shariand Sharinnor Slaine Sudiond Syareth Syorond Taliesin Tanriond Taranis Tariond Thaliand Thardiond Tharidinn Toriand Trahern Tryariol Tutgual Tyorwer Uthyr Vandiol Voridower Vorior Ywain Zelphar

Aderyn Aerafrin Aerathielle Aerona Aeronvia Aeronwen Agrona Aife Ailbhe Andraste Angharad Anwen Aoife Ayda Blathine Blodeuedde Branwen Branwenne Bronwyn Carrian Ceibfionne Cithrel Cliodna Corianna Daireanne Dairine Derdriu Eadan Eadaoinne Eafrin Eawen Eawynne Eilwyn Eirian Eirwen Eithne Ellarwyn Ellethia Ellonvia Elluthia Elluvia Eonoa Eonthia Etainne Faewen Faewynne Fayelle Fayonelle Feyarwyn Feyelle Feyonoa Finnguala Fionnuala Gladys Glorafrin Gloriel Grainne Gwenda Gwendolynne Gwenna Gwennyth Gwynna Gwynnyth Iriel Iruthia Jasianna Lorasatra Luthiel Luvioa Lythianna Maeve Matrona Merethyl Merialeth Merrianna Morafrin Morgan Morriganne Morwen Morwynne Muirenne Muirne Neamhainne Neasa Nithenoel Nolwen Nunvioa Olwenne Paphyra Quennalynne Rheva Rhiannon Rhiva Rhonwynne Rhosyn Rigantona Sabia Saphielle Shyannon Shyarwen Sinanne Sionanne Sirona Solana Sophia Syarelle Syareth Taegen Tanila Tannaquille Tarieth Tiriana Tolwyn Toria Urosynne Ursalynne Ursula Urwyn Violette Voriel Vorionia Yvaine Yvonne Zaleria

Repeat.Words: ash autumn bark birch bird bloom blossom blue bow bracken bramble branch brave breeze briar bright brook bush caller caster cliff cloud dance dancer dawn day dream dreamer drifter dusk dweller ember ever fair fenn fern fey fire flame frost gale green grey hail heart hunter leaf light merry mist moon moss nettle night oak oaken ocean pale pine quick rain river sapling sea seed seeker seer shade shadow shore shrub silver singer sky song soul spell staff star stave storm strider summer sun swift thorn treader tree twig twiggy twigs vine walker wander wanderer whisper wild willow wind wing winter wise wood wren yew
